caption: A family is gathered in a kitchen for a meal. A woman with blonde hair wearing a blue v-neck shirt is seated at a table with a yellow mug and a glass of orange juice in front of her. Next to her is a man with curly hair in a grey t-shirt. Across from them is a balding man in a white and blue checked short-sleeved button-down shirt. Beside him, a woman with blonde hair in a white top is talking and gesturing with her finger. The kitchen background features floral wallpaper and open white shelving holding various bowls, jars, and kitchenware. As the scene progresses, the camera shifts focus from the woman in blue to the man in the checked shirt, who is speaking. Finally, a wider shot reveals the full group seated around a white circular table set with plates of food, orange juice, and a butter dish.
